creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please test and approve this patch.
FETCH_ARGS needed changing (for http at least) since downloads-> does a 302 to download-mirror.
Note, I was never able to obtain file from ftp site.  It never responded.

-- 
Michael Scheidell, CTO
SECNAP Network Security Corporation
http://people.freebsd.org/~scheidell
